text: Fire role only. Interrupt: When this province is broken, choose an opponent's character – move 1 fate from that character to a character you control. Errata from RRG v11
flavorText: One man’s famine is another man’s feast.
name: Feast or Famine

text: Cannot be a stronghold province. Interrupt: When this province would be broken, if there are no honor tokens on it – place 1 honor token on it instead.
name: Public Forum

text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor – draw 3 cards. Reduce the cost of each event you play during this conflict by 2.
name: Kakita Yoshi

text:
Limit 1 per deck.
[conflict-military] conflicts cannot be declared against this holding's province.
name: Chisei District

text: While this character is attacking, only characters that have an odd printed cost count their skill toward the resolution of this conflict.
flavorText: "Is it just to uphold an unjust law?"
name: Enigmatic Magistrate

text: Action: While the [element-water] ring is claimed – ready this character.
flavorText: "To adapt and flow around any problem, this is the lesson of water." – Isawa’s Elements
name: Prodigy of the Waves

text: Interrupt: When a [clan-scorpion] character you control leaves play – attach that character to this holding facedown instead of placing it in its owner's discard pile. Action: Play an attached facedown character from this holding as if it were in this province. Then, sacrifice this holding.
name: Back-Alley Hideaway

text: Reaction: After a province this character is attacking is revealed – the attacker has the first action opportunity this conflict.
name: Child of the Plains

text: Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker, discard the top card of your dynasty deck – this character gets +X[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. X is the printed cost of the discarded card.
flavorText: "If samurai were as loyal as dogs, there would be no need for Bushidō."
name: War Dog Master

text: Reaction: After you play this character – it gains covert until the end of the phase.
flavorText: "My lord, I bring grave tidings from beyond the Wall."
name: Hiruma Skirmisher

text: Attached character gains the [clan-crab] clan symbol and the Berserker trait.
flavorText: In the name of Lord Hida Kisada, Defender of the Wall
name: Seal of the Crab

text: Reaction: After your opponent declares a [element-water] conflict, choose a Monk character or a character with a Monk attachment – ready that character and draw 1 card.
name: Mantra of Water

text: During a conflict in which this character is participating, increase the cost for each player to play each event by 1.
flavorText: "It is good to see you again, Grandmother. You have not aged a day. Ever." – Ikoma Ikehata
name: Ageless Crone

text: Action: During a conflict, if your honor bid is lower than your opponent's, choose a [clan-lion] character you control – move that character to the conflict. Then, honor it.
name: Test of Courage

text: Action: During a conflict, bow a (friendly) [clan-phoenix] Shugenja character. Choose a participating character you control – honor that character.
flavorText: "Blessed Benten, Lady of Love and Beauty, shine your radiance upon me. Let my hands work your beauty in the mortal realm and my words spread your grace to all."
name: Benten's Touch

text: Action: While this character is participating in a [conflict-political] conflict, choose a participating character with lower [conflict-political] than this character – move the chosen character home. Then, you may bow it.
flavorText: "Which of us would bid this game to end? We are nearly perfectly matched, but there can be only one victor."
name: Bayushi Kachiko

text: Action: During a conflict, if your honor bid is at least 2 higher than your opponent's – each participating character your opponent controls gets -1[conflict-military] and -1[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
name: Misinformation

text: Seeker role only. Action: During a conflict in which you are the attacking player – move the contested ring to another eligible province and reveal it, if able. That province is now the attacked province.
name: Chasing the Sun

text: Attach to a Courtier character you control. Action: Bow attached character – search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for a card, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.
name: Tattered Missive

text: Play only if you have the Imperial Favor. Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate – cancel those effects.
flavorText: "I bring word from the Imperial Chancellor."
name: Censure
